text:
§2.4 Action on elevated progesterone
When serum progesterone exceeds the cycle-day threshold, consider a freeze-all strategy and escalate for biologist review before trigger.

§2.3 Cycle-day-dependent progesterone thresholds
Progesterone thresholds are cycle-day dependent: 1.0 ng/mL through day 6, 1.5 ng/mL on days 7-8, and 1.75 ng/mL from day 9. A value at or above the day threshold flags premature luteinization.
